name: Hot and Sweet Country Mustard
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the dry mustard, all-purpose flour, granulated sugar, and salt in a bowl.
2. Slowly stir in the cider vinegar until well combined.
3. Allow the mixture to sit for 3 to 4 days at room temperature before tasting.
4. Store the finished mustard in a cool place; it keeps indefinitely.
